title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 116.230 - Sample ballots to be prepared, form
text:
116.230.  Sample ballots to be prepared, form. — 1.  The secretary of state shall prepare sample ballots in the following form.
  2.  The top of the ballot shall read: "OFFICIAL BALLOT STATE OF MISSOURI"
  3.  When constitutional amendments are submitted, the first heading shall read: "CONSTITUTIONAL AMENDMENTS" 
  4.  When statutory measures are submitted, the next heading shall read: "STATUTORY MEASURES" 
(L. 1980 S.B. 658, A.L. 1985 H.B. 543)
